name: Test: Webhook → Email Notification

parameters.subject: New Lead: {{ $json["name"] || "Test Lead" }}

_comment: SETUP INSTRUCTIONS: 1) Import this workflow in n8n (Workflows → Import → paste JSON). 2) Set up SMTP credentials (Settings → Credentials → Add → SMTP). 3) Activate the workflow. 4) Test with: curl -X POST https://<your-n8n-url>/webhook/test-lead -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"name":"Test User","email":"your@email.com","message":"Hello from chatbot"}'. 5) Verify email arrives. Story 5 (ITT-28) will replace this with the production lead capture workflow.
